package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_serialization_gzip_writer_created_per_small_payload: Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag gzip writers created for tiny payloads where compression overhead can dominate.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule590NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario590Negative(records []Rule590NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
